The main focus is a stylized humanoid-like cartoon figure with a white head and body outline in gray/black lines. It has a single large black oval eye with a white vertical highlight area and a small curved mouth line. The arms and legs are drawn as short, rounded, stick-like shapes with simple curved line details; the figure appears to be in a standing or slightly hunched pose with one arm bent near the chest and the other arm angled downward.

Setting:

Visual Details:
The drawing uses thin gray/black contour lines and mostly white fill for the body and head. The eye is the darkest element, a black oval, with a narrow white stripe near its left side. The face has minimal line shading and no visible texture beyond the sketch lines. The camera perspective is flat and front-facing or slightly angled, with the figure centered and filling most of the image.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image is a minimal cartoon sketch of a small rounded character with one prominent black eye. It is drawn in simple line art on a plain white background.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
